---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new data source, output format, or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case — what are you trying to accomplish that the tool doesn't currently support?

**Proposed solution**
How should this work? Include example commands if applicable.

```bash
python harvest.py domains.txt --new-flag
```

**Data source or output?**
- [ ] New data source (e.g. new search engine, API, scraping method)
- [ ] New output format (e.g. Google Sheets, Airtable, CRM)
- [ ] Pipeline improvement (e.g. better extraction, new detection method)
- [ ] Performance (e.g. async, proxy rotation, caching)
- [ ] Other

**Alternatives considered**
Have you tried other tools or workarounds?

**Would you be willing to contribute a PR?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
